prompt: Subject is the exact woman from the reference image, leaning naturally against a massive white stone pillar of the Independence Palace balcony, looking thoughtfully toward the horizon. Her body is positioned in a relaxed side-profile, showing the elegant silhouette of her white silk Ao Dai, which features micro-creases at the waist and realistic fabric tension where her body presses against the stone. Her skin exhibits realistic imperfections and a soft sheen from the humidity, with individual hair strands catching the backlight. A secondary hand from the photographer's POV is seen at the edge of the frame, gently adjusting the flow of her red silk trousers to ensure a perfect drape. The environment is detailed with weathered stone textures and distant city life. Lighting is soft, indirect daylight bouncing off the palace walls. Shot with a Canon EOS R5, 50mm f/1.2L lens, mid-shot composition, emphasizing the textural contrast between silk and stone.
